facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,363 reviews. At a seafood spot most tourists never find.

Nha Hang Quoc Thien sits in Ấp Gành Dầu, the quiet northern tip of the island. The crowd here? Locals. The seafood? Fresh off the boat that morning.

Skip the tourist strip. Come up here instead.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the seafood land on this table. 4.7 stars, 1,363 reviews, northern Phu Quoc. Nha Hang Quoc Thien is what the tourist restaurants wish they were.
